properties.name: PTS Pickup
properties.description:
Offers courtesy cart rides across UT Austin’s main campus for faculty, staff, students, and visitors. To request a ride, just wave down a PTS Pickup driver and share your destination.
Learn More

properties.name: PTS Shop Shuttle Stop - 2400 Nueces
properties.description:
Free round-trip transportation from campus to H-E-B for UT Austin students.
Learn More
properties.Comments: The PTS Shop Shuttle will not operate on certain Saturdays and Sundays due to university events and holidays.
properties.Hours: Select Saturdays and Sundays, 10 a.m. - 2 p.m.

_umap_options.name: Transportation Services
_umap_options.description: These transportation services help students get around campus and the city, often for free. They make it easier to access classes, jobs, or grocery stores located far away from campus.
